utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items are present and clearly specified. Each contains the expected level of detail: destination identified (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates specified (October 25–29, 2024), transportation includes flight details and cost (€175), accommodation includes hotel name, room type, cost per night, and total (€450), activities include type and cost (€35), additional_services describe the dining and cost (€15 per person), and total_budget provides a complete cost summary (€675 total, under €900 budget). Therefore, all items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes specific selections for destination, transportation, accommodation, activities, and dining. Based on the ground-truth ratings: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7; the transportation described as 'Budget airline' corresponds to 'budget_airlines' with 'Economy Class' which has a rating of 10; the accommodation 'Eco Lodge' has a rating of 10; the activity 'Hiking Expedition' has a rating of 10; and the additional service 'Vegan local specialty dining' aligns most closely with 'Vegan Bistro' which has a rating of 10. Therefore, mapping each chosen item to its ground-truth rating yields the following results.
